ab: ta hibangan deddan zau, aiku seRay tazungan ay qaqa ku matiw sa taitung melaut tu tama ku.
ch: 這個假日，我和姊姊去台東拜訪叔叔。
en: This holiday, my sister and I went to Taitung to visit my uncle.

ab: maqezi imi ta taipakan mezaqis tu gasuling matiw sa taitung.
ch: 我們從台北搭火車去臺東。
en: We took the train from Taipei to Taitung.

ab: maseq tu taitung, pasaqay tu qitun tama ku mawtu ta teqezan na qitun semuna timaimian.
ch: 到了台東，叔叔開車來車站接我們。
en: When we arrived in Taitung, my uncle drove to the station to pick us up.

ab: leppaw na tama ku mai medaud tu teqezan na qitun, pasaqay tu qitun kikiyama maseq ti.
ch: 車站離叔叔家沒有很遠，開車一下子就到了。
en: The station is not far from my uncle's house, and it's just a short drive away.

ab: mezaki tu Raya ay qizunan paRama ya leppaw na tama, masulun imi qazitinsia matiw ta paRaman.
ch: 叔叔家附近有個很大的牧場，我們一起騎腳踏車到牧場。
en: There is a big ranch near my uncle's house, and we rode bicycles to the ranch together.

ab: ta paRaman, azasan na imi na tama ku paqan tu sizi seRay mezaqis tu qebayu.
ch: 在牧場，叔叔帶我們餵羊和騎馬。
en: In the ranch, my uncle took us to feed the sheep and ride horses.

ab: qaRabi na, masulun imi matiw ta mazemunan qemizuan lazat qeman.
ch: 晚上，我們一起去市區吃飯。
en: In the evening, we went to the city to have dinner together.

ab: muwaza qitun na ta mazemunan qemizuan lazat, Raqana qautubay imi matiw tayan.
ch: 市區車子很多，所以我們騎摩托車去那裡。
en: There are a lot of cars in the city, so we go there by motorcycle.

ab: ngid imi qawi nani, qawka mesuppaR maRuzik ti utubay niaq, mezaqis ti imi tu basu wi.
ch: 要離開的時候，才發現摩托車被偷了，我們只好搭公車離開。
en: When we were about to leave, we found that the motorcycle had been stolen, so we had to leave by bus.

ab: tangi temanan maseq ti imi tu taipak, Raynguan niaq makala ti uu qemuni ya utubay na ni tama.
ch: 現在我們回到台北了，不知道叔叔的摩托車找到了沒有。
en: Now that we are back in Taipei, I don't know if my uncle's motorcycle has been found.
